Mission.title: Mission
Mission.description: A single automation run or task.

status.description: The current status of the mission.

progress.description: The progress percentage of the mission (0-100).

target.description: The target URL or system for the automation.

updatedAt.description: When the mission was last updated.

ownerId.description: The ID of the user who owns this mission.

Log.title: Log
Log.description: A telemetry log entry for a specific mission.

missionId.description: The ID of the mission this log belongs to.

level.description: The severity level of the log.

ownerId.description: The ID of the user who owns this log.

RawFile.title: RawFile
RawFile.description: A file extracted during a mission.

missionId.description: The ID of the mission this file belongs to.

url.description: The download URL of the file.

size.description: The size of the file in bytes.

category.description: The category of the file (e.g., Atendimento, Cadastros).

ownerId.description: The ID of the user who owns this file.

/logs/{logId}.description: Stores all telemetry logs for missions.

/files/{fileId}.description: Stores metadata for all extracted files.
